name: DIAC – Deputy Counsel – 9 Posts
qualification: Any Post Graduate, LLM, PG Diploma

basic_details.job_title: DIAC Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Delhi International Arbitration Centre (DIAC) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Deputy Counsel. Candidates with Diploma or Post Graduation/ LL.M Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 01-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DIAC official website delhihighcourt.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Enrolled as an Advocate under the Advocates Act, 1961 with any State Bar Council, Three (03) years post qualification experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DIAC Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Delhi International Arbitration Centre Deputy Counsel Recruitment 2026
